meta.title: LogiMarket.pl - B2B catalog of warehouse equipment and supplies
meta.description: Forklifts, racking, pallets, packaging and logistics equipment in one place. Hybrid B2B model: RFQ + E-Commerce.

nav.constructionNotice: MARKETPLACE W BUDOWIE / MARKETPLACE UNDER CONSTRUCTION

hero.title: Catalog of warehouse equipment and supplies
hero.description: Forklifts, racking, pallets, packaging and logistics equipment in one place.
hero.modelDescription: Hybrid model: RFQ for heavy equipment, E-Commerce for repeatable items.

catalog.directoryIntro: Browse catalog groups and categories to narrow procurement of equipment, storage systems and intralogistics solutions.
catalog.filtersEmptyDescription: Change or clear filters to see more offers in this category.
catalog.emptyDescription: Check other categories or come back later.
catalog.platformNotice: LogiMarket.pl is a hybrid B2B platform. For heavy equipment, we provide an RFQ model (request for quotation); for repeatable items, we provide an E-Commerce model with a cart. Sales and order fulfillment are handled directly by the partner. LogiMarket.pl is not a party to the transaction.

solutions.catalogIntro: Explore solution pages to compare approaches to warehouse processes and prepare your procurement.
solutions.relatedIntro: Explore B2B solutions relevant to this catalog area.

bySlug.agv-amr-do-palet-i-ciezkich-ladunkow: AGV and AMR for pallets and heavy loads
bySlug.roboty-transportowe-do-pojemnikow-i-kart: Transport robots for totes and cartons
bySlug.autonomiczne-systemy-zaladunku-i-rozladu: Autonomous pallet loading and unloading systems
bySlug.baterie-i-zasilanie-robotow-magazynowych: Batteries and power systems for warehouse robots
bySlug.wozki-i-nosniki-do-agv-amr: Carts and load carriers for AGV / AMR
bySlug.infrastruktura-nawigacyjna-i-trasy-agv-a: AGV / AMR navigation infrastructure and route marking
bySlug.integracja-robotow-z-wms-wcs-erp: Robot integration with WMS / WCS / ERP
bySlug.serwis-i-sla-robotow-magazynowych: Service, maintenance and SLA for warehouse robots

introsBySlug.regaly-i-systemy-skladowania: Wide selection of warehouse racking and storage systems to optimize your hall space.
introsBySlug.wozki-i-transport-wewnetrzny: Reliable forklifts, pallet jacks, and material handling equipment for load operations.
introsBySlug.wyposazenie-magazynu: Durable workshop furniture, packing tables, and plastic bins for efficient work.
introsBySlug.opakowania-i-materialy-eksploatacyjne: Essential packaging materials, stretch films, wrappers, and transport pallets.
introsBySlug.systemy-bezpieczenstwa-i-oznakowanie: Professional safety barriers, protectors, warehouse marking, and PPE.
introsBySlug.osprzet-do-wozkow-widlowych: Forklift attachments for positioning, clamping, rotating, lifting and securing loads in warehouse operations.
introsBySlug.pozycjonery-i-przesuwy-boczne: Fork positioners and side shifters help align loads accurately without repeated truck repositioning.
introsBySlug.chwytaki-do-wozkow-widlowych: Specialized clamps for handling bales, rolls, cartons, drums and other non-palletized loads.
introsBySlug.obrotnice-do-wozkow-widlowych: Forklift rotators support controlled turning or emptying of bins and loads in production and warehouse processes.
introsBySlug.widly-i-przedluzki: Forks, extensions and weighing solutions selected by carriage class, rated capacity and load-unit profile.
introsBySlug.systemy-push-pull-i-stabilizatory-ladunk: Push-pull systems, load stabilizers and multi-pallet handlers support fast movement of slip-sheet and unstable loads.
introsBySlug.osprzet-wysiegnikowy-i-dzwigowy: Jibs, hooks and lifting adapters convert a forklift into controlled lifting equipment for suspended loads.
introsBySlug.osprzet-budowlany-komunalny-i-rolniczy: Construction, municipal and agricultural attachments extend forklifts for bulk materials, snow removal and sweeping work.
introsBySlug.bezpieczenstwo-i-praca-na-wysokosci: Work platforms and safety cages for controlled service tasks performed at height with a forklift.
introsBySlug.kosze-robocze-na-widly: Fork-mounted work cages for short service tasks at height, focused on stability, protection and safety compliance.
introsBySlug.robotyzacja-magazynu: This section covers warehouse robots, infrastructure, software and services for automating material flow and picking operations.
introsBySlug.roboty-mobilne-agv-amr: Mobile AGV and AMR robots for moving totes, cartons and other load units within warehouse facilities.
introsBySlug.agv-amr-do-palet-i-ciezkich-ladunkow: AGV and AMR systems for pallets, heavy loads and autonomous industrial-truck operations.
introsBySlug.goods-to-person-i-automatyzacja-kompleta: Goods-to-person solutions that bring goods or shelving to picking stations and support organized retrieval workflows.
introsBySlug.roboty-kompletacyjne-i-manipulacyjne: Robots for picking, palletizing, depalletizing, sorting and other warehouse handling operations.
introsBySlug.egzoszkielety-i-wspomaganie-pracy: Exoskeletons and assistance devices for lifting, carrying and repetitive warehouse tasks.
introsBySlug.infrastruktura-do-robotyzacji-magazynu: Equipment, power systems, safety systems, navigation and components used to operate warehouse robots.
introsBySlug.oprogramowanie-i-integracja-robotow: Software for fleet management, monitoring, simulation and robot integration with WMS, WCS and ERP.
introsBySlug.wdrozenie-i-utrzymanie-robotyzacji: Services covering audits, concept design, integration, commissioning, process modernization and robot-system maintenance.

offers.ecommerceNotice: This product is available in the E-Commerce model. Add it to the cart and submit a B2B order.
offers.rfqNotice: This offer requires an individual quote. Send an RFQ inquiry and the partner will prepare an offer.

rfq.title: Request for quote (RFQ)
rfq.successDescription: The partner will prepare a B2B quote and contact you.
rfq.descriptionSuffix: The inquiry will go directly to the partner.
rfq.consent: By submitting the form, you agree to share your data with the partner.

cart.title: Your cart
cart.emptyDescription: Add products from the catalog to submit a B2B order.

checkout.title: B2B order
checkout.successDescription: Your B2B order has been saved. Our team will contact you.
checkout.description: Complete the form to submit an order. This is not an online transaction - our team will verify availability.
checkout.legalNote: Submitting an order is not an online transaction. Our team will verify availability and contact you.

footer.description: B2B marketplace for warehouse equipment and supplies. An offer catalog connecting buyers with verified partners.
footer.partnerPrompt: Want to list your products? Contact us:
footer.copyrightSuffix: Sales are handled directly by partners.
